value.stringValue: - Go to Change Control Requests
- Go to Batches In Progress
- Go to Amend Phase Request
- Go to Monthly Updates
- Go to rejected Drawdown Requests
- Go to Monthly Updates
- Go to Returned Batches
- Go to Amend Phase Request

assignments.name: Assign_Total_Count_of_Queried_Funding_Transactions
assignments.label: Assign Total Count of Queried Funding Transactions

Flow.description: Screen flow that alerts the GR that there are important items to attend to
Flow.label: GMS - Home Page Alerts

recordLookups.name: Get_Change_Control_Request
recordLookups.label: Get Change Control Requests Awaiting GR

textTemplates.name: txt_Actions_Notification
textTemplates.text: ﻿You have {!var_Actions_Count} open Actions

textTemplates.name: txt_Batches_Draft_Notification
textTemplates.text: ﻿You have {!var_Batches_Returned_Count} draft Batches

textTemplates.name: txt_Batches_Returned_Notification
textTemplates.text: ﻿You have {!var_Batches_Returned_Count} returned Batches

textTemplates.name: txt_CCR_Notification
textTemplates.text: ﻿You have {!var_Total_CCR_Count} Change Requests Updated

textTemplates.name: txt_Disbursements_Open_Notification
textTemplates.text: You have {!var_Disbursement_Count} open Payment Records

textTemplates.name: txt_Funding_Drawdown_Returned_Notification
textTemplates.text: You have {!var_Drawdown_Returned_Count} rejected Funding Drawdown Requests

textTemplates.name: txt_Funding_Transactions_Notification
textTemplates.text: You have {!var_FundingTransactionsCount} queried Funding Transactions

textTemplates.name: txt_Monthly_Meeting_Not_Booked
textTemplates.text: Your next Monthly Meeting has not been set

textTemplates.name: txt_Monthly_Meeting_Time
textTemplates.text: Your Monthly Meeting is due to take place at the following date and time: {!Get_Next_Monthly_Meeting.Monthly_Meeting_Date_Time__c}

textTemplates.name: txt_Monthly_Update_Open_Notification
textTemplates.text: You have {!var_Monthly_Update_Open_Count} open Monthly Updates

textTemplates.name: txt_Monthly_Update_Resubmission_Notifications
textTemplates.text: You have {!var_Monthly_Update_Resubmitted_Count} Monthly Updates that have had resubmission requested

textTemplates.name: txt_Phase_Request_Returned_Notification
textTemplates.text: ﻿You have {!var_Phase_Request_Returned_Count} returned Phase Requests

textTemplates.name: txt_Phase_Requests_Draft_Notification
textTemplates.text: ﻿You have {!var_Phase_Request_Draft_Count} draft Phase Requests {!var_Phase_Requests_Draft_URL}
